name: Boat trip to the unspoilt southern coves (Menorca Blava, Ciutadella)
description: A day at sea from the old harbour of Ciutadella to the most sought-after coves of the south-west, the ones with no road. A swimming platform, a sun deck and rice cooked on board: the comfortable way to see Son Saura, Turqueta and Macarella without a car.

highlights: sail the unspoilt south-west: Son Saura, Es Talaier, Turqueta, Macarella and Macarelleta
two swimming stops with direct access from the boat's platform
mixed paella on board and sea caves with no land access; around 7 h
